base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of grassland_tileset — a tile from 1988 super mario bros 2. Subspace grassland (Worlds 1/2/5) — grass-floor, bushes, platforms, subcon-door. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Subspace grassland (Worlds 1/2/5) — grass-floor, bushes, platforms, subcon-door
